name: Under Bed Rolling Kids Storage - Brightroom™
description:
Store your kid's toys, electronics and other frequently-used items close by while they sleep with the Under-Bed Rolling Kids' Storage from Brightroom™. This cream storage box is designed in a rectangular shape with an open top to make it easy to stash away the items. Made of plastic, this portable storage box rests on rolling casters for easy movement around their room.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
